message:
feat(engine): overhaul ESM export resolution to match ES2020 star re-export semantics

Rewrite resolve_export_inner to use backtracking visited sets so cyclic
star-reexport paths do not shadow valid sibling bindings. Add DuplicateExport
error variant, enforce that export-star never re-exports "default", treat
identical star re-exports from the same origin as non-ambiguous, and preserve
BindingType through re-export chains. Rebuild live-binding phase 2 as an
iterative fixed-point pass with proper star-reexport surface cells and
explicit-export shadowing. Detect self-loops in find_cycles. Remove the
nightly int_roundings feature gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
